description: Static IPTV web player for Latin America & USA — HLS.js, channel search, favorites, watch history, custom M3U loading. Dark OTT theme. No build tools.

index.html.role: Main app — all UI, CSS, and JS logic. NO channel data embedded.

sections.css_vars: :root block at top — all design tokens (colors, spacing, typography)
sections.js_state: Variables declared after <script>: favs, dead, hist, allCh, channels, filtered, activeIdx
sections.js_boot: boot() — async fetches channels.json, then calls buildTabs/buildCountryFilter/filterChannels/bindKeys
sections.js_playback: startPlay(ch) — HLS.js or native HLS fallback, error retry logic, auto-remove dead streams
sections.js_filter: filterChannels() — applies activeTab + group dropdown + text search; debouncedFilter() wraps it
sections.js_render: renderList() — renders filtered[] as .ch-item elements with inline event handlers
sections.js_tabs: TABS array → buildTabs() → activeTab state variable drives filterChannels()
sections.js_favorites: toggleFav(i) / toggleActiveFav() — stored in localStorage key iptv_favs
sections.js_history: addToHist(url) called on playAt(); stored in localStorage key iptv_hist (last 30)
sections.js_m3u: parseM3U(text, fallbackGroup) → mergePlaylist(newChs) — handles URL or File input
sections.js_keyboard: bindKeys() — ↑↓ navigate, / search, Space play/pause, F fav, M mute, Del remove, ? shortcuts

channels.json.role: All channel data — fetched async by index.html on load
channels.json.format: JSON array of {name, logo, group, url} objects
channels.json.source: Merged from iptv-latam-usa.m3u + iptv-custom.m3u + additional sources
channels.json.where_to_add_channels: Append objects to the array. Required fields: name (string), url (string). Optional: logo (string URL), group (string).
channels.json.where_to_edit_channels: Find channel by name or url, edit the object in-place.

iptv-latam-usa.m3u.role: Source M3U playlist — Latin America & USA channels
iptv-latam-usa.m3u.note: Reference/source file; channels.json is the derived working copy

iptv-custom.m3u.role: Custom M3U playlist — Venezuela/LATAM focus, categorized
iptv-custom.m3u.note: Reference/source file; channels.json is the derived working copy

tv-alt.html.role: Easter egg page — personal message, no functional code

localStorage_keys.iptv_favs: JSON array of stream URLs the user has favorited
localStorage_keys.iptv_dead: JSON array of stream URLs permanently removed by the user
localStorage_keys.iptv_hist: JSON array of stream URLs in reverse-chronological play order (max 30)

add_channels_quickstart.via_ui: Click 'Load' button in topbar → paste M3U URL or pick local .m3u file
add_channels_quickstart.via_channels_json: Edit channels.json — append {name, logo, group, url} to the array
add_channels_quickstart.via_m3u_file: Edit iptv-latam-usa.m3u or iptv-custom.m3u, then re-run the merge script (not automated)

key_functions.playAt(i): Play channel at index i in filtered[]
key_functions.filterChannels(): Re-filter channels[] based on activeTab, group dropdown, and search text
key_functions.toggleFav(i): Add/remove channel at index i from favorites
key_functions.parseM3U(text, group): Parse M3U text → array of channel objects
key_functions.mergePlaylist(channels): Add new channels to runtime state, deduplicating by URL
key_functions.boot(): Entry point — fetches channels.json, initializes UI

ai_agent_notes.to_add_a_channel: Edit channels.json — append to array. name + url required.
ai_agent_notes.to_change_colors: Edit CSS :root vars in index.html — top of <style> block.
ai_agent_notes.to_add_a_tab: Add entry to TABS array in index.html JS, then add filter logic in filterChannels().
ai_agent_notes.to_change_group_flags: Edit FLAGS object in index.html JS.
ai_agent_notes.channel_data_not_in_html: index.html contains ZERO channel data — all channels live in channels.json.
ai_agent_notes.no_build_step: Edit files directly — no npm, no bundler, no compilation needed.
